headline: Today's top AI story: 'Ghostcommit' hides prompt injection in images to fool AI agents, steal secrets
bullets: 'Ghostcommit' hides prompt injection in images to fool AI agents, steal secrets
Meta kills Muse Image feature that let anyone generate AI photos of Instagram users without consent
Ghostcommit: Multimodal Prompt Injection Attack Exposes AI Code Review Tools to Supply Chain Risks - Rescana
Australia warns of global campaign targeting vulnerable CMS platforms

If you use Open Code or other agenting programs you are leaving a lot of t/s if you don't actually use agents in parallel. Benchmark : RTX5090, Qwen3.6 35B loaded via LM studio with parallel tasks set to 8
